discoveryKit.bullet2: In the color of your choice
discoveryKit.body: Three samples in your team color, shipped to your door. Feel the fabric, see the embroidery, decide with confidence.
discoveryKit.headline: Order a discovery kit

items.q: What is your production lead time?
items.a: Five business days after logo approval for most items. Embroidered jackets can take up to ten days.
Six pieces for embroidery, twelve for screen print. Smaller? Talk to us, we'll work something out.

items.q: Do I see the logo before production?
items.a: Always. You receive a digital proof and approve it before we touch any apparel.

footer.tagline: Company apparel and signage. Made and embroidered in Quebec for over 20 years.

hero.headline: Company apparel that looks professional from day one.
hero.subhead: Embroidered and printed polos, tees, and hoodies for Quebec SMBs. Full-service, fast turnaround, durable quality.
